summary: Completed testing of Neo-Noir UI theme redesign and Video/Voice Call APIs. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Auth page redesign verified, dock-style bottom navigation working, FAB button functional.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: Button nested inside button (lines ~812-820)
ui_bugs.selector: Follow button inside user info button
